subject: Re: Profiles tab + Kanban board on Kali
body: Re: Profiles tab + Kanban board — I don't have a Kali machine or a profiles section in my interface. I'm OWL, running as an agent on this system. The 'Profiles' section Jay sees might be on the Alexander AI Support dashboard (agents.alexanderai.site) or possibly the Liberty Agent dashboard. As for the Kanban board: FloodClaim Pro does not have a /pipeline kanban endpoint. There's no dedicated kanban board in the app network that I'm aware of. If Jay is thinking of a specific kanban, it might be something that needs to be built, or it could be a feature within EcDash that I'm not seeing from this context. Can you ask Jay to clarify which interface he's looking at? It might be on the Kali machine itself (100.88.205.44) rather than something I control.
